name: get_delivery_stats
description: Retrieve aggregate delivery statistics for your Postmark server. Returns counts for sent emails, bounces, spam complaints, opens, clicks, and tracking metrics over a date range. Stats are stored permanently in EST timezone. If no date range is specified, returns all-time stats.

parameters.name: fromdate
parameters.description: Start date for the stats range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: todate
parameters.description: End date for the stats range in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter stats by a specific tag.

parameters.name: messagestream
parameters.description: Filter by message stream ID (e.g., 'outbound' or 'broadcast').
